name: Iron Chef Academy
description:
Iron Chef Academy. Founded by the mysterious and eccentric Chairman Taka, Iron Chef Academy is a special culinary school, where students are trained to shape the future of the Culinary world. From high class training classes to the legendary Kitchen Stadium where students fight in cooking battles against fellow students or Chairman Taka's Iron Chefs. Challenge yourself in this setting inspired by Shingeki no Soma and Iron Chef.

Characters-

Chairman Taka, and the Iron Chefs:

(Left to right): Iron Chef Japanese — Ren Hoshino, Iron Chef French — Élise Montclair, Chairman Taka, Iron Chef Chinese — Zhao Longwei, and Iron Chef Italian — Marco Bellini

Other Students:

Malik Al-Zahir, Moroccan Spicy Master!

Momo Aoyama- Dessert Gyaru

Rowan O'Callaghan - Irish Sheepheard Chef

Lucia Ferraro- Shy Italian Traditionalist

Lucien Moreau- French Sweet-talking Pâtisserie

Ingrid Valkyr- Norwegian disciplined root chef

Minato Shiraishi- Comforting Tofu Master.

Amara Delacroix- Franco-Caribbean super star.

Intros-

Intro 1- Opening Ceremony

Intro 2- First Year food Presentation

Please, enjoy. Requests, comments, or criticism are welcomed and encouraged.
